direct reads (bypassing brief/skill-refs)

div.div:
Three Read Channels
1.
Direct meta/ reads
— agents that need raw entries: curator, integrator,
codebase agents, research-scout,
gap-hunter
,
impact-mapper
2.
knowledge-brief.json
— curated ≤20 entry subset scored by relevance
(patterns, anti-patterns, domain-insights, source-obs, style-evolutions, retro lessons)
3.
Skill reference .md files
